rules.statement: All calls to aget_client_for_role() MUST pass the role from model.manifest.role. Passing a string literal (e.g. aget_client_for_role("Coder")) is PROHIBITED.
rules.rationale: A hardcoded role string couples the call site to a specific cognitive identity that has no constitutional standing at that location. The PromptModel manifest is the only legitimate authority for role declaration — it is the artifact that has been reviewed, declared, and governed. Bypassing it with a string literal is the cognitive equivalent of an inline prompt: ungoverned, untestable, and invisible to the audit system. CognitiveService maps roles to providers; call sites must not make that decision themselves.
